headline: Seven Pillars – Galle Fort wins Best Luxurious Villa
standfirst: Seven Pillars – Galle Fort is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Best Luxurious Villa, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Seven Pillars – Galle Fort and the award record

Seven Pillars – Galle Fort is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Best Luxurious Villa. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Seven Pillars – Galle Fort, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Seven Pillars No.39 Galle Fort is presented by official and booking sources as a villa/accommodation property. The GBE archive records the hospitality award. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.

The Best Luxurious Villa recognition places Seven Pillars – Galle Fort in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025.
